{"_description":"Twelve-Factor App methodology, organized as a mind map.","type":"mindmap","title":"twelve-factor app","root":"root","nodes":[{"id":"root","label":"12 Factor","kind":"ellipse","accent":"accent"},{"id":"code","label":"Codebase","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"deps","label":"Dependencies","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"cfg","label":"Config","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"bs","label":"Backing
Services","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"br","label":"Build /
Run","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"proc","label":"Processes","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"port","label":"Port
Binding","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"conc","label":"Concurrency","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"dispo","label":"Disposability","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"parity","label":"Dev/Prod
Parity","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"logs","label":"Logs","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"admin","label":"Admin
Processes","kind":"ellipse"}],"edges":[{"from":"root","to":"code"},{"from":"root","to":"deps"},{"from":"root","to":"cfg"},{"from":"root","to":"bs"},{"from":"root","to":"br"},{"from":"root","to":"proc"},{"from":"root","to":"port"},{"from":"root","to":"conc"},{"from":"root","to":"dispo"},{"from":"root","to":"parity"},{"from":"root","to":"logs"},{"from":"root","to":"admin"}]}
